Index: 
===================================================================
--- 
+++ 
@@ -0,0 +1,12 @@
+FROM node:18-alpine
+
+WORKDIR /app
+COPY package*.json ./
+RUN npm install --omit=dev
+COPY . .
+
+# Data volume mount point -
+RUN mkdir -p /data
+
+EXPOSE 8080
+CMD ["node", "server.js"]

commits.name: Commit-0
commits.content:
FROM node:18-alpine

WORKDIR /app
COPY package*.json ./
RUN npm ci --only=production
COPY . .

# Data volume mount point -
RUN mkdir -p /data

EXPOSE 8080
CMD ["node", "server.js"]
